concerns.text: FR-005 requires integration of 'visualization UI'. The plan (Phase 2) and data-model (data-model.md) define artifacts for 'visualization' but do not include a task, component, or mock service to generate or render this visualization. The plan focuses on ASR/TTS/Agent mocks but omits the visualization component required by the spec.

FR-005 requires integration of 'memory summarizer'. While 'memory_summary' is listed as an output artifact type in data-model.md, the plan (Phase 2) and research.md do not define a component, logic, or mock service to generate this summary. The pipeline orchestration in run_scenario.py is described as integrating ASR, Video, Model, TTS, and Agent, but the memory summarizer is missing from the implementation steps.
